name: Thunder Dragon Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雷龍融合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サンダー・ドラゴン・フュージョン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Thunder Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling the Fusion Materials listed on it into the Deck, from among your cards on the field, in your GY, and/or your face-up banished cards. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 Thunder monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Thunder Dragon Fusion" once per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Thunder Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling the Fusion Materials listed on it into the Deck, from among your cards on the field, in your GY, and/or your face-up banished cards. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 Thunder monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Thunder Dragon Fusion" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
